examples: It is customary to offer a drink or a snack to guests.
In the United States, it is not customary to telephone somenone very early in the morning.
Church records show he was baptized on April 26, and three days was a customary amount of time to wait before baptizing a newly born baby.
She cited unnamed law enforcement sources, a practice that is customary in investigative journalism.
The best leaders understand that usual and customary are not necessarily synonymous with healthy and thriving.
